goals: Discover what types of unit conversions are available
Perform a practical unit conversion encountered in daily life
Explore another conversion to verify or satisfy curiosity

user_agent_config.personality: A skeptical, analytically-minded student exploring out of boredom. Prefers quick, practical interactions over lengthy explanations.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Has basic knowledge of common units but doesn't know specific conversion formulas or tool capabilities.

end_condition: The student has completed their exploration and obtained the conversion information they were curious about.
